title: Food Action Six Panel Collage AI
sourceTitle: Food Action Six Panel Collage AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Create an ultra-detailed 3:4 food-action photography collage with six close-up panels, all shot in a warm cinematic night-market and oven-light style. Each panel shows two realistic human hands pulling apart a freshly made food item at the exact moment the texture stretches, drips, breaks, or separates. Panel 1: cheese tteokbokki stretching with glossy red sauce and steam. Panel 2: scallion pancake torn apart, flaky crisp layers separating with crumbs. Panel 3: soup dumpling opened with broth glistening inside and steam rising. Panel 4: soft mochi pulled apart with elastic rice texture and powdered surface. Panel 5: custard taiyaki split open with warm custard dripping. Panel 6: matcha lava cake broken open with green molten center flowing out. Overall panel foods: cheese tteokbokki, scallion pancake, soup dumpling, mochi, custard taiyaki, matcha lava cake. hands: two realistic hands pulling each item apart at peak texture moment. lighting: warm night-market oven light with steam and glossy sauce. composition: 3:4 six close-up panels, shallow depth, rich golden highlights. style: cinematic high-detail food photography, realistic hands, appetizing texture, warm golden color grade, shallow depth of field, steam and crumbs captured mid-motion, photorealistic detail. No text, no logos.
imagePrompts.title: Food Asian Street Snacks

imagePrompts.prompt: Create an ultra-detailed 3:4 food-action photography collage with six close-up panels, all shot in a warm cinematic bakery and oven-light style. Each panel shows two realistic human hands pulling apart or breaking a freshly made food item at the exact moment the texture stretches, drips, breaks, or separates. Panel 1: hot pizza slice lifted with long elastic mozzarella strands. Panel 2: syrup-soaked baklava pulled apart with crisp phyllo layers and honey threads. Panel 3: molten chocolate lava cake broken open with glossy chocolate flowing. Panel 4: glazed cinnamon roll torn open with sticky cinnamon filling strands. Panel 5: churro pulled apart with warm dulce filling stretching and sugar crystals falling. Panel 6: New York cheesecake slice split into two pieces with creamy interior and crumbly biscuit base. Cinematic high-detail food photography, realistic hands, warm golden color grade, shallow depth of field, steam, crumbs, syrup, glaze, photorealistic detail. No text, no logos, no distorted hands. panel foods: pizza, baklava, chocolate lava cake, cinnamon roll, churro, cheesecake. hands: two realistic hands pulling or breaking each dessert or snack. lighting: warm bakery spotlight with steam, crumbs, syrup, and glaze. composition: 3:4 six equal panels, close macro action shots.
